calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Of Richard Fasos Petition For Order Relieving Petitioner From Provisions Of Govt C Section 945.4
Off Calendar Sep-16-2022 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Joseph Nykodym, Esq. (925.262.7045; jnykodym@habbaslaw.com) of Habbas, Nasseri & Associates for Petitioner, Richard Faso via Zoom.
Natassia Kwan, Esq. (415.554.4272; natassia.kwan@sfcityatty.org) Deputy City Attorney for Respondent, City and County of San Francisco.

ARGUED The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER RICHARD FASO'S Petition For Order Relieving Petitioner From Provisions Of Govt C Section 945.4 is DENIED.

[see word minutes for details.]

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)
